---
title: "gaussian_noise"
generated: true
description: "Add i.i.d. Gaussian noise per element."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.augment.intensity`](../nitrix-augment-intensity.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:gaussian_noise -->
```python
gaussian_noise(x: Float[Array, '...'], key: Array, *, sigma: Float[Array, '...']) -> Float[Array, '...']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:gaussian_noise -->
Add i.i.d. Gaussian noise per element.

Draws independent zero-mean Gaussian noise with standard deviation
`sigma` for every element of `x` and adds it to the input, so each
perturbation is distributed as $\mathcal{N}(0, \sigma^2)$.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:gaussian_noise -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `x` | `Float` | `...` | — | Intensity tensor. |
| `key` | `Array` | — | — | PRNG key. |
| `sigma` | `Float` | `...` | — | Standard deviation of the additive noise (scalar or broadcastable to `x`). Drawing it randomly is the caller's concern. |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `...`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:gaussian_noise -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
